allow: PowerShell($env:UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT = "$env:TEMP\\vsf-backend-venv"; uv run --directory external_repos/VSF-audio-pipeline/backend pytest tests/test_vocal_separation.py -v)
PowerShell($env:UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT = "$env:TEMP\\vsf-backend-venv"; uv run --directory external_repos/VSF-audio-pipeline/backend pytest -q 2>&1 | Select-Object -Last 20)
PowerShell($env:UV_PROJECT_ENVIRONMENT = "$env:TEMP\\vsf-backend-venv"; uv run --directory external_repos/VSF-audio-pipeline/backend pytest 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "passed|failed|error")

PowerShell($dst = "E:\\VSF\\TTS\\pipeline_runs\\demucs_e2e\\raw"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dst | Out-Null; Copy-Item "E:\\VSF\\TTS\\tmp\\vfva-ba-oov-117-org-1.wav" $dst; Copy-Item "E:\\VSF\\TTS\\tmp\\vfva-ba-oov-118-org-1.wav" $dst; Get-ChildItem $dst | ForEach-Object { "{0}  {1:N0} bytes" -f $_.Name, $_.Length })
